appraisal_events.evidence: « sa figure se rembrunit »; « Tu pourrais regarder d’un autre côté… ces danseurs ne valent pas la corde… »; « Trois messieurs… voyant l’air furieux de Robert de Saint-Loup, se rapprochèrent, amusés »; la maîtresse s’écrie au danseur : « c’est mon ami… regardez-moi ces petites mains ».
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator presents Robert as jealous and aggressive, trying to impose his authority; onlookers are amused by his fury and the mistress openly displays her interest in the dancer, which exposes and lowers him locally.

status_effects.explanation: His authoritarian attempt publicly fails; journalists draw near, amused, which makes him lose face in the scene.
